idea-plugin.name: OAuthLint
idea-plugin.description:
OAuthLint catches OAuth, OIDC, JWT, session, cookie, and CORS anti-patterns that AI coding tools frequently produce, and surfaces them as native inline annotations while you edit.

It scans the current file on open and on save and highlights each finding with a gutter marker and a tooltip that carries the rule id, the explanation, and a link to the rule documentation. Severity is mapped to the IDE's own error, warning, and weak-warning levels.

OAuthLint is fully self-contained. The rule pack ships inside the plugin and the Opengrep scan engine is downloaded once and verified against a pinned SHA-256 checksum. There is nothing else to install.

Supported languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, and Java, activated automatically wherever the matching language support is present.
